ShortDescription.Value: Limits total time transit waits at stops; Late passengers stop preventing transit from leaving, causing endless boarding.

Publish.LongDescription:
## Fast Boarding [Beta]
Faster public transit boarding - Increase transit usage, reduce blocked stops, reduce private car demand indirectly. - The larger your city, the more this mod will help. - Instead of replacing the transport system files, this build focuses on two behaviors:
- **Prefab stop tuning** for bus, tram, train, subway, ship, ferries, and air transit - **Optional Let Vehicles Leave** so tardy citizens can miss a vehicle instead of holding it forever.
### What the sliders do
Tune boarding speeds for:
- Bus, Rail (train, tram, subway), Water (ship, ferry), Air - Higher values shorten dwell time by increasing stop loading speed and adjusting the boarding-time estimate used by the game. - ✅ When **Let Vehicles Leave** is enabled, late passengers who are *still not ready* after *departure time* can be dropped from that vehicle's boarding process. - The goal is simple: let the vehicle leave instead of waiting on passengers who are late, possibly far away. The game then naturally reassigns them.
### Status report included - After the city runs a bit, check the Options menu to see current status. - *Skipped* number shows how many late passengers have been skipped so the transit can leave on time. - This is a snapshot of right-now; if the skip number stays at "0" for a long time, make sure to enable the checkbox ✅. - For more detailed stats, use the [Stats to Log] button. - Example usage: Worst stop shows over 10 minutes, check it for traffic, bad placement, not enough vehicles, or replace the stop. - This is a one-shot button that does not run in the city per-frame, so no performance impact. - When investigating, I like to click the button every 30 min, then compare the report later; it also shows exactly where the worst stops are and more.
### Notes - Compatibility: conflict will be with any mod that touches boarding behavior, like All-Aboard, so choose one or the other. - This is intended to be a lighter, safer alternative than replacing the game's entire Transport system files. - Group boarding is handled conservatively to avoid splitting groups across platform and vehicle. - This mod works well with `Public Works Plus` to solve many transit issues. - Save-game safe. Safe to remove anytime. - No Harmony patches; lightweight design for low overhead and negligible performance impact.
### Support and feedback If mods help you, give them a Like, it's easy way to show support for free mods :) Feedback on: Github, Discord, etc., link icons on this page.
### Credits - RiverMochi....mod author - Inspiration and thanks to bcallender's All Aboard mod and Wayze's old InstantBoarding. - yenyang.......for testing and code feedback - Neco1996......for testing - MayorCheeks...for testing
